response:
Nurse Emily needs to prepare a total of 3 writing prompts per group for the session, and she also has an additional set of 10 prompts to be shared equally among all the groups. With 24 residents divided into groups of 6, there are 4 groups in total. 

Each group will receive 3 initial prompts, and the extra 10 prompts will be divided equally among the 4 groups, meaning each group gets 2 extra prompts. Therefore, each group will have 3 + 2 = 5 prompts. 

In total, the number of writing prompts Emily needs to prepare is:

$$
4 \text{ groups} \times 5 \text{ prompts per group} = 20 \text{ prompts}
$$

The library contains a variety of writing prompts that can be used to support the residents, and the library also provides resources that can be shared among the groups. 

The END.
